# On Moral Ends

*Cicero · 45 BCE*

A dialogue in five books in which Cicero sets out and confronts the great doctrines of the sovereign good, Epicurean, Stoic, and Academic. Book III offers one of antiquity's fullest accounts of Stoic ethics, including the doctrine of [oikeiōsis](../glossary/oikeiosis.md).
